scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json services/*/node_modules services/*/package-lock.json frontend/node_modules frontend/package-lock.json nexbill-console/node_modules nexbill-console/package-lock.json
scripts.install:services: for d in services/*/; do (cd "$d" && npm install); done
scripts.install:all: npm run install:root && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:console && npm run install:services
scripts.setup: npm run clean && npm run install:all
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:identity" "npm run dev:subscription" "npm run dev:billing" "npm run dev:payment" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:console"
